name: Two-Tone Kitchen Flatware Set Gold - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Dishwasher Safe, Stainless Steel, 5-Piece Set
description:
Elevate your tableware with this Two-Tone Kitchen Flatware Set from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This stainless steel set features a two-tone design with silver-finish tops and modern flat handles in a gleaming gold tone, making it great both for everyday use and formal settings. With service for one, the five-piece tableware set includes a dinner fork, dinner spoon, dinner knife, salad fork and teaspoon. Best of all, each piece is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
